title: why does monday.com require me to log in when I am assigned a task if I currently have it open
excerpt: I have Monday.com open in a chrome window and use it all day long.   When I am assigned a task I get an email with a link to the task.  Upon clicking the link it takes me to a Monday.com login screen where I have to log …

posts.author: ALyb (Andy)
posts.cookedHtml: I have Monday.com open in a chrome window and use it all day long. When I am assigned a task I get an email with a link to the task. Upon clicking the link it takes me to a Monday.com login screen where I have to log in to see the task. How do I get it so that it takes me to the task without having to re-log in?
